description_long: This armchair features a broad, rounded backrest and wide, gently sloping armrests, all upholstered in a warm, tan-colored fabric with a prominent quilted diamond pattern. The seat is deep and inviting, with the upholstery continuing seamlessly across the arms and back, giving it a cohesive and plush appearance. The chair stands on four short, tapered wooden legs stained in a dark brown finish, providing a sturdy base and a subtle contrast to the upholstery. The surface texture appears soft and slightly matte, with visible stitching accentuating the diamond pattern throughout. The overall silhouette is modern yet comfortable, with ample seating space and a supportive, high backrest. This design would suit both indoor urban lounges and stylish outdoor patios in city environments.
description: A modern, tan armchair with quilted diamond upholstery, wide padded arms, and dark tapered wooden legs. The chair has a plush, inviting look with a rounded backrest and seamless stitching.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, padded armrests, and the full height of the rounded backrest with the diamond quilted pattern.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the depth of the seat, the sloping armrest, and the curvature of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, rounded backrest and the continuous diamond quilted upholstery, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizes the armrest's width, the seat's depth, and the smooth transition from arm to backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered with quilted diamond fabric
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, and fully upholstered with a continuous diamond quilted pattern
attribute_leg_type: short, tapered wooden legs with a dark finish
